phrases.intent_en: Ask how far the beach access is from here
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve l'accès à la plage le plus proche ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo seh TROOV lak-SEH ah lah PLAZH leh ploo PROSH
phrases.cultural_note: The Promenade stretches 7km along the Baie des Anges. Most sections have direct beach access via small ramps.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the beach chairs are free or for rent
phrases.text_local: Les transats sont-ils gratuits ou payants sur cette plage ?
phrases.pronunciation: leh tran-SAH son-TEEL gra-TWEE oo pay-AN soor SET plazh
phrases.cultural_note: Nice has both public (free, pebbly) and private (paid, with loungers) beach sections side by side.

responses.english: The beach chairs are for rent.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the nearest bike rental is
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je louer un vélo près d'ici ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEE-zheh loo-AY un VAY-lo preh dee-SEE
phrases.cultural_note: Vélo Bleu is Nice's bike-share system with stations all along the Promenade.

responses.english: There is one at the end of the promenade.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ahn ah uhn oh BOO duh lah proh-muh-NAHD
responses.local: Il y en a un au bout de la promenade.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are showers on the beach
phrases.text_local: Il y a des douches sur la plage ?
phrases.pronunciation: eel ee ah day DOOSH soor lah PLAHZH
phrases.cultural_note: Public beaches along the Promenade des Anglais typically have free outdoor shower posts for rinsing off after swimming.

responses.phonetic: wee eel ee ah day DOOSH grah-TWEET
responses.local: Oui, il y a des douches gratuites.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which direction leads to the old town
phrases.text_local: Dans quelle direction se trouve le Vieux-Nice ?
phrases.pronunciation: dan KEL dee-rek-SYON seh TROOV leh vyuh-NEES
phrases.cultural_note: Vieux-Nice is at the eastern end of the Promenade, near Castle Hill.
